'''dayapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrophobia|iatrophobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrophobia|iatrophobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dayapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæyæpæth|dæyæpæth]] || [[word:dæyæpæj|dæyæpæj]] || [[word:dæyæpæsh|dæyæpæsh]] || [[word:dæyæpæ|dæyæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayayapath|dayayapath]] || [[word:dayayapaj|dayayapaj]] || [[word:dayayapash|dayayapash]] || [[word:dayayapa|dayayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayapath|dayapath]] || [[word:dayapaj|dayapaj]] || [[word:dayapash|dayapash]] || [[word:dayapa|dayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayafpath|dayafpath]] || [[word:dayafpaj|dayafpaj]] || [[word:dayafpash|dayafpash]] || [[word:dayafpaf|dayafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dayapatha|dayapatha]] || [[word:dayapaja|dayapaja]] || [[word:dayapasha|dayapasha]] || [[word:dayapaka|dayapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dayapath|dayapath]] || [[word:dayapaj|dayapaj]] || [[word:dayapash|dayapash]] || [[word:dayapa|dayapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dayapathal|dayapathal]] || [[word:dayapajal|dayapajal]] || [[word:dayapashal|dayapashal]] || [[word:dayapakal|dayapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dayapathatha|dayapathatha]] || [[word:dayapajaja|dayapajaja]] || [[word:dayapashasha|dayapashasha]] || [[word:dayapaka|dayapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dayapathan|dayapathan]] || [[word:dayapajan|dayapajan]] || [[word:dayapashan|dayapashan]] || [[word:dayapakan|dayapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dayapathaoro|dayapathaoro]] || [[word:dayapajaoro|dayapajaoro]] || [[word:dayapashaoro|dayapashaoro]] || [[word:dayapakaoro|dayapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
